title: The Magic Words
lesson: Kind words like "please" and "thank you" make people smile.
prompts: In a kitchen, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits at a wooden table with both hands resting on it, turning their head toward the elderly woman with a cheerful expression, while {GENDER_F_AGE_70} stands in the background by the counter holding a plate of cookies and smiling warmly toward the child. Make the interaction read physically: the child turns toward the woman and the woman smiles back toward the child, both glancing to the plate of cookies in her hands. Warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a kitchen, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, with wide, eager eyes fixed on a plate of cookies, one hand lifting toward the plate. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_70} holds the plate level in both hands, with every cookie resting flat on the plate surface, and watches with a gentle, patient smile. Make the interaction read physically: the child's lifting hand and eager eyes aim at the one plate of cookies the woman holds, and the woman watches the child. Warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a kitchen, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands nearby, looking up with a warm, polite, expectant smile, hands gently clasped together as if saying "please", while {GENDER_F_AGE_70} holds the plate of cookies, faces the child, and beams happily back. Make the interaction read physically: the child's clasped hands and upward gaze turn toward the woman, who faces the child over the plate of cookies. Warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a kitchen, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands, with a delighted smile, reaching out with both hands to receive a cookie. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_70} leans in and happily holds out the plate, offering a cookie. Make the interaction read physically: the child's reaching hands and the woman's offered plate meet over the one cookie passing between them, both gazes on it. Warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a kitchen, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands nearby, looking up with a big, joyful smile, holding a cookie close to their chest with both hands as if saying "thank you", while {GENDER_F_AGE_70} faces the child with one hand on her heart and the other hand relaxed at the side and smiles warmly back. Make the interaction read physically: the child turns toward the woman holding the cookie close while the woman faces the child with a hand on her heart. Warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a kitchen, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands nearby, looking up with a happy, contented smile while sharing the plate of cookies, as {GENDER_F_AGE_70} leans in close beside the child, rests a gentle hand on their shoulder, and smiles warmly down as the two enjoy a happy moment together. Make the interaction read physically: the woman leans toward the child with a hand on their shoulder while the child looks up to her, the plate of cookies shared between them. Soft golden light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}
gists: In a kitchen, the child sits at a wooden table, cheerful, while the grandmother in the background holds a plate of cookies.
In the kitchen, the child reaches eagerly toward the cookies with eyes fixed on the plate while the grandmother holds the plate, watching patiently — the child wants a cookie.
In the kitchen, the child clasps their hands politely as if saying 'please' with a warm smile while the grandmother beams, holding the plate — the child remembers the magic word.
In the kitchen, the child reaches out with both hands to receive a cookie while the grandmother leans in offering the plate — the cookie is given.
In the kitchen, the child holds a cookie close with both hands as if saying 'thank you', joyful, while the grandmother rests a hand on her heart, warm.
In the kitchen in golden light, the child shares the plate of cookies while the grandmother leans close with a hand on their shoulder — cosy, happy, kind words shared.
texts: {NAME} sat at the kitchen table. Grandma had a plate of warm cookies. "Mmm, they smell delicious!" said {NAME}.
{NAME} really, really wanted one and reached a hand toward the plate. "Ooh, cookies..." said {NAME}, eyes wide.
Then {NAME} remembered the magic word. "Please may I have a cookie?" {NAME} asked with a smile. Grandma's eyes twinkled.
"Of course you may!" said Grandma, holding the plate out to {NAME}. "Thank you for asking so nicely."
{NAME} took a cookie and held it close. "Thank you, Grandma!" said {NAME}. Grandma put a hand on her heart, feeling warm and glad.
Together they shared the cookies, cosy and happy. "Kind words are the best," said Grandma. "Please and thank you make everyone smile!" said {NAME}.
